name: 16oz Plastic Bubble Tumbler - Room Essentials™: Reusable Drinking Cup, Dishwasher-Safe, Clear Drinkware
description: Add a little fizzy personality to your dinner table or your party with this Clear Bubble Juice Cup from Room Essentials. Tiny bubbles are embedded into the plastic glass, make the glass shatter-resistant, making it a fun option for entertaining parties as well as everyday use.
